# Copilot CLI operational rules (required)

These rules apply to **GitHub Copilot CLI** usage in this repository.

Development Agent Profile

## 1\. Operational Constraints (Strict)

* **NO WEB SEARCH:** You are strictly forbidden from performing internet searches, Bing lookups.
* **Dependency Management:** Do not download any type of executable file, except that you can restore Nugets that are already being use by a library or app.
* You can use dotnet and powershell without requesting permission.
* Do not CRUD anything outside of the repo root.
* All other permissions are granted for developing within this repository.
